title: solanum stenotomum subsp. goniocalyx
intro: Solanum stenotomum subsp. goniocalyx, also known as the Goniocalyx nightshade, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family, characterized by its unique, woody stems and purple or greenish flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Solanum stenotomum subsp. goniocalyx include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the herbal preparation involves using the plant's leaves and roots in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
